meta-description: Learn about pre-existing condition insurance plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary."
title: Pre-existing Condition Insurance Plan (PCIP)
excerpt: A program (that no longer exists) created by the Affordable Care Act to provide a health coverage option if you were uninsured for at least 6 months, had a pre-existing condition, and were denied coverage (or offered insurance without coverage of the pre-existing condition) by a private insurance company.
content: A program (that no longer exists) created by the Affordable Care Act to provide a health coverage option if you were uninsured for at least 6 months, had a pre-existing condition, and were denied coverage (or offered insurance without coverage of the pre-existing condition) by a private insurance company.
